title: Esoteric Distillation
description: Esoteric Distillation adds new brewing recipes for vanilla status effects that are otherwise unobtainable (as potions) in survival Minecraft.
body:
# ![A titlecard that states "Esoteric Distillation" in blocky font. The words are backlit in cyan, magenta, and yellow.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b505f3361e007581f0bfa6abbf477200e7a2e93.png)

Esoteric Distillation is a Fabric mod that adds 16 new brewing recipes for potions and effects not typically obtainable in vanilla survival Minecraft.

These include, but are not limited to:
- Potion of Decay (Wither)
- Potion of Luck
- Potion of Absorption
- Potion of Haste
- Potion of Blindness
- Potion of Vitality (Health Boost)
- Potion of Charm (Hero of the Village)
- Potion of Famine (Hunger)

...and many more. If a status effect exists in vanilla Minecraft, this mod adds a craftable potion for it.

Additionally, all potions come with Splash, Lingering, and Tipped Arrow variants.

![An image displaying a row of 10 potion sprites at the top. Below and to the left, a small box displays a further six potions. To the right of that box, black text backlit by white states "16 New Potions". ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a2641603eaf7a17bb7b0332a5504bbc7b2c212d.png)

## Brewing Recipes

Most potion recipes require a base Awkward Potion to start, made using a Water Bottle and a Nether Wart in a brewing stand. The following table lists the ingredients used to transform an Awkward Potion into a functional Potion, as well as the enhanced and lengthened variants.

| Ingredient          | Icon                  | Effect               | Redstone | Glowstone |
|:-------------------:|:---------------------:|:--------------------:|:--------:|:---------:|
| Honey Bottle        | ![An image of a Honey Bottle sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cefa7bb1a96253cdc54dd16cbe3a7f4e4d2661df.png)           | Haste (3:00)         | 8:00     | II (1:30) |
| Rotten Flesh        | ![An image of a Rotten Flesh sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03a1cea5ea3d8fe601387aa55ade9e76f30922a1.png)           | Hunger (1:30)        | 4:00     | II (0:20) |
| Golden Apple        | ![An image of a Golden Apple sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9a2b7075806198c9b4b845fc6f2ad21d34d3ba1.png)           | Health Boost (3:00)  | 8:00     | II (1:30) |
| Raw Gold            | ![An image of a Raw Gold chunk sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f98a404574cad6ed9735dc8728bcf3acca7be2af.png)           | Absorption (1:30)    | 4:00     | III (0:45)|
| Beetroot Soup       | ![An image of a Beetroot Soup sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15c289716d96cd915364bfaaf46a29b4ef1ea704.png)           | Saturation X         | N/A      | XX        |
| Glow Berries        | ![An image of the Glow Berries item sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adb84d203ba9dff8234ff9af1a51fb77a1385f9e.png)           | Glowing (1:30)       | 4:00     | N/A       |
| Lapis Lazuli        | ![An image of the Lapis Lazuli sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0e7d7cef762563ba18be30fdb8cc55113bc11cd.png)           | Luck (5:00)          | N/A      | III (5:00)|
| Prismarine Crystals | ![An image of the Prismarine Crystals sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddbdc7757b6b167f78a2fdf2973d60253a677138.png)           |Dolphin's Grace (3:00)| 8:00     | N/A       |
| Goat Horn           | ![An image of the Goat Horn sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a15ceac2cc4484a482c8380a2b2ea017ebc1f1ed.png)           | Bad Omen (3:00)      | 8:00     | III (1:30)|
| Totem of Undying    | ![An image of the Totem of Undying sprite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc73c74aefc700db6d64c3ddc203ae23b692c0c4.png)           |Hero of the Village (3:00)| 8:00 | III (1:30)|

The next six Potion recipes are somewhat unique, in that they are "corrupted" versions of other Potions. This means that they are all made by applying a Fermented Spider Eye to an existing Potion. 

Bear in mind that, while lengthened Potions can be corrupted (and will retain the lengthened modifier!), enhanced Potions **cannot** be corrupted. Make sure to only apply Glowstone _after_ corrupting the Potion.

| Original Potion | Corrupted             | Redstone | Glowstone |
|:---------------:|:---------------------:|:--------:|:---------:|
| Potion of Haste | Mining Fatigue (1:30) | 4:00     | III (0:20)|
|Potion of Regeneration|Wither (0:40)     | 1:30     | II (0:20) |
|Potion of Saturation| Nausea (0:45)      | 1:30     | N/A       |
|Potion of Luminescence| Blindness (0:45) | 1:30     | N/A       |
|Potion of Slow Falling| Levitation (0:25)| 1:00     | II (0:13) |
| Potion of Luck  | Bad Luck (5:00)       | N/A      | III (5:00)|
